title: MET B2 Skills Exercise Pack
subtitle: Authentic B2 exercises across Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking, and Grammar

exercises.question: q1
exercises.prompt: Look at the picture and describe what you see. [Picture: two people building a bookcase in a small apartment; boxes on the floor; one person reads the instructions]

exercises.question: q1
exercises.prompt: Look at the picture and describe what you see. [Picture: people waiting for a bus in heavy rain; one person sharing an umbrella; busy street in background]

exercises.question: q1
exercises.prompt: Look at the picture and describe what you see. [Picture: a busy hospital waiting room; people sitting; a nurse speaking to a patient at the reception desk]

exercises.question: q1
exercises.prompt: Look at the picture and describe what you see. [Picture: a family eating dinner together around a table; different generations present; food in the center of the table]

exercises.question: q2
exercises.prompt: Tell me about a time when you learned a practical skill from someone else.

exercises.question: q2
exercises.prompt: Tell me about a time when you were late and had to solve the problem quickly.

exercises.question: q2
exercises.prompt: Tell me about a time when you volunteered to help someone or something. What did you do and how did it make you feel?

exercises.question: q2
exercises.prompt: Tell me about a skill you had to learn through practice and patience. How did you approach learning it?

exercises.question: q2
exercises.prompt: Tell me about a time when you had to make a difficult decision. What was the situation and how did you decide what to do?

exercises.question: q3
exercises.prompt: Some people prefer buying things new. Other people prefer buying second-hand items. What do you prefer? Give reasons.

exercises.question: q3
exercises.prompt: Is it better to study or work in silence, or with background music? Give your opinion and reasons.

exercises.question: q3
exercises.prompt: Some people prefer to plan their holidays carefully. Others prefer to be spontaneous. Which type are you? Give reasons.

exercises.question: q3
exercises.prompt: Do you think it is better to live in a big city or a small town? Give your opinion with reasons.

exercises.question: q3
exercises.prompt: Is it better to spend money on experiences, like travel and concerts, or on material things? Give your opinion.

exercises.question: q4
exercises.prompt: Your college is considering moving one day of classes each week online. What are the advantages and disadvantages of this idea?

exercises.question: q4
exercises.prompt: A company wants employees to use shared desks instead of having fixed desks. What are the advantages and disadvantages?

exercises.question: q5
exercises.prompt: The school principal is considering extending library opening hours in the evening. Talk to the principal. Explain what you think and try to convince them to agree with you.

exercises.question: q5
exercises.prompt: A city official is deciding whether to add more bicycle parking near the train station. Talk to the official and explain why you agree or disagree.

exercises.question: q5
exercises.prompt: Your workplace is considering installing a gym and relaxation room for employees. Talk to your manager and explain why you think this is a good idea.

exercises.question: q5
exercises.prompt: A local library is planning to reduce its physical book collection to make space for a digital media lab. Talk to the librarian and share your opinion.
